author: DominicVainMod
content:
Help us improve future Star Atlas releases by sharing what games you enjoy playing and what features of those games are most appealing to you. 

Fill in this one-minute survey until Friday, September 23, at 12pm (EST)! → https://forms.gle/BH8eGP9nqCkJ9UwJ9
